modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty placing a VoIP call on hold in Cisco system.

full_description_text:  
User attempted to place a VoIP call on hold.  
The action was not successful.  
This occurred within the Cisco VoIP environment.  
Clarification on the hold feature is needed.
short_description: Difficulty placing a VoIP call on hold in Cisco system.
description:
